## Efficiency Review

### 1. Hot-path: `computeCardLayout()` called every frame (lobby.ts:619)

`computeCardLayout(h, w)` is called inside `render()`, which fires every animation frame. It does `Math.ceil`, `Math.floor`, `Math.min`, and allocates a new `CardLayout` object each time. On desktop the result only changes when the canvas resizes. This should be memoized (cache on `w,h`) or recomputed only on resize.
